title: Smoky Hash Flakes
description: A Kenyan-inspired hash with smoky flavor, flaky texture, and a floral twist. Perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: kenyan spices
ingredients.notes: mix of turmeric, cumin, and coriander

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add 1 tbsp of kenyan spices and 1 tbsp of floral to the pan. Cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped onion to the pan. Cook for 3-4 minutes, until softened.
Add the minced garlic to the pan. Cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the smoky hash to the pan. Cook for 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
Serve the hash hot, garnished with additional floral if desired.
